text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for lunch, and Fuji Kiseki and I are in the
cafeteria looking at the menu for the day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll get an apple slice and... half an orange.
Yes, that should be enough.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, I ate too much during dinner
yesterday, and I don't want to overdo it again
today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, my dear ponies have been cooking
up a storm for me each night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After I accepted a meal from one of them, the
whole dorm heard about it, and now I'm met with
a nightly buffet of food.
choice_data_list:
If you're struggling to eat everything, you
should decline their offers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right, but... they pour their whole hearts
into their cooking, and I don't want to let them
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand where she's coming from, but it's still
a problem if she's overeating on a daily basis...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Fuji! I'm so glad I found you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. You're the one who made that
delicious omelet rice last night, yes?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I made it again today, and well... I
was hoping to give it to you!
choice_data_list: Actually, I'm not so sure if that's...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I can't believe I get to enjoy your
omelet rice yet again. I must be the luckiest
person in all of Tracen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Please, I should be the one thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch their exchange, I get the feeling Fuji
Kiseki's charming graciousness is what made so
many students start cooking for her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
See? Look how happy she is! It would be wrong to refuse
such a generous offer.
choice_data_list: Fine, but only have one bite!
Fine, but only have one bite!
All right, all right. Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
See? Look how happy she is! It would be wrong to refuse
such a generous offer.
choice_data_list: Fine, but only have one bite!
Fine, but only have one bite!
All right, all right. Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for understanding.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I'm under strict orders and can
have but a single mouthful. I hope you don't
mind, sweet pony.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Are you on a diet right now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I am. But worry not! I'll make sure
to savor the taste of your cooking and commit it
to memory. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Fuji Kiseki takes a spoonful of
the omelet rice and relishes it as if it's pure
ambrosia.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you for respecting my feelings, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Why, I can't wait to taste—hm? This looks larger
than the one you made last night.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's because it is! I loaded it up with all my
love. I hope you like it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Aha. No wonder your food is always so
scrumptious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki tucks into the omelet rice and cleans
her plate, much to the delight of her adoring fan.
